name: Electrs
description: High-performance Electrum server. Indexes the blockchain for wallets.
compose:
name: "slashnode-electrs"
services:
  electrs:
    image: "mempool/electrs:latest"
    container_name: "electrs"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    entrypoint: "electrs"
    command:
      - "--network"
      - "mainnet"
      - "--daemon-rpc-addr"
      - "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.host}:8332"
      - "--daemon-dir"
      - "/home/bitcoin/.bitcoin"
      - "--cookie"
      - "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.user}:${bitcoind.exports.rpc.password}"
      - "--electrum-rpc-addr"
      - "0.0.0.0:50001"
      - "--http-addr"
      - "0.0.0.0:3000"
      - "--db-dir"
      - "/data"
    ports:
      - "50001:50001"
    volumes:
      - "electrs-data:/data"
      - "bitcoin-data:/home/bitcoin/.bitcoin:ro"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  electrs-data:
    name: "slashnode-electrs_electrs_electrs-data"
  bitcoin-data:
    external: true
    name: "slashnode-bitcoind_bitcoind_bitcoin-data"
